title: Generated CLI Follow-Ups #657-#660
goal: Ingest and implement #657, #658, #659, and #660 as one generated-CLI dogfooding lane.
Keep the lane queue explicit and route any newly discovered dogfooding findings into the same queue until it is empty.
non_goals: Do not move generated Python outputs under generated/python in this lane.
Do not generate mutation-capable apply adapters before safety maturity is explicit.

intent.outcome: Generated CLI authority and maturity are current, enforceable, and honest after #641.
intent.constraints: Use checked-in planning before code edits, keep runtime primitives hand-owned, and avoid overclaiming mutation maturity.
intent.latitude: May decompose and implement bounded dogfooding follow-ups without asking when they are actual bugs or unintended behavior.
intent.escalation: Stop before changing generated CLI architecture beyond the issue scope or moving Python generated outputs.

execution.next_step: Inspect generated command package coverage and current checks for #657.
execution.proof: Focused generated-command and conformance checks, then make check before closeout.

invariants: Contracts and IR own command/interface truth for generated surfaces.
Generated adapters delegate to hand-owned runtime primitives.
Lifecycle mutation/apply behavior remains deferred unless safety conformance proves promotion.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Finish the generated CLI migration honestly enough that future command-interface changes go through canonical contracts and all remaining exceptions are named.
intent_continuity.continuation surface: none when #657-#660 and lane-discovered bug findings are implemented; otherwise this plan queue

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Post-migration generated CLI authority, Memory package-local read-only promotion, lifecycle dry-run/refusal maturity, and mutation-gate clarity.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: #661 generated/python relocation remains deferred until generated CLIs are fully landed.

intent_interpretation.literal request: Ingest and implement #657-#660; follow the same dogfooding protocol; feed new findings into the current queue and keep working until the queue is empty.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Use the package workflow to finish the current generated-CLI follow-up queue, not just patch one issue.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: One active checked-in plan with explicit issue queue, implementation batches, proof, and closeout.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Check that any deferrals are explicit and that newly discovered actual bugs were fixed rather than only recorded.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: Generated CLI contracts, generators, generated outputs, package CLI routing, conformance tests, focused docs/reviews, and planning state for this lane.
execution_bounds.max changed files: Broad but bounded to generated CLI follow-up surfaces.
execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py; uv run python scripts/generate/generate_command_packages.py --check; uv run pytest tests/test_generated_tool_conformance.py tests/test_contract_tooling.py -q; make check
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Ask before moving generated Python output roots, replacing runtime primitive architecture, or promoting mutation apply behavior beyond explicit safety gates.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Unrelated docs cleanup, unrelated historical archives, and #627 large-file remediation.

stop_conditions.stop when: #657-#660 and lane-created dogfooding bug findings are implemented, validated, committed, pushed, and archived.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: The lane requires generated/python relocation, broad runtime file splitting, or mutation semantics changes.
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: A finding is an optimization or optional design improvement rather than an actual bug or unintended behavior.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: A full check failure cannot be reduced to a bounded issue in this lane.

context_budget.live working set: #657-#660 issue bodies, command_package_ir, operation/conformance contracts, generator, generated package checks, package CLI files.
context_budget.recoverable later: Historical #641 archive and generated CLI PR discussion.
context_budget.externalize before shift: Update this execplan queue, execution_run, proof_report, and improvement_signal_review.
context_budget.pre-work memory pull: Only route-specific memory if implementation touches an unfamiliar package boundary.
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Drain #657-#660 from state.toml work_items; add actual dogfooding bugs to that queue and implement before closeout.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: After each commit or before broad generated output regeneration.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Implement the whole queue with dogfooding discipline.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: No premature generated/python move; no mutation apply overclaim; commit and push as work lands.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact grouping of generated command promotions, audits, tests, and docs.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The intended maturity model conflicts with current package architecture.

adaptive_assurance.reason: Multi-issue generated CLI authority work touches command contracts, generated outputs, runtime routing, and conformance.

risk_refs: mutation adapters must not be over-promoted
hand-authored interface authority must not silently return

evidence: state.toml work_items for #657-#660 are empty, closed, or explicitly routed
control_gates.next_action: Implement queued issue slices and remove completed queue items.

evidence: generated command and conformance checks pass
control_gates.next_action: Run focused generated CLI proof after implementation.

risk_registry_refs: Generated adapters may make Python look privileged if layout is changed prematurely.
Lifecycle dry-run promotion may blur into mutation apply if maturity labels are not explicit.

durable_residue_prompts: If a new actual bug is found, create or add a state.toml work_items queue entry and implement it before archive.

architecture_decision_promotion.notes: The generated/python relocation decision is already captured by #661 and deferred.

active_milestone.scope: #657 first, then generated adapter promotion and lifecycle maturity queue

immediate_next_action: Inspect generated command package coverage and current checks for #657.
invariants: Generated command files are regenerated, not manually edited.
Lifecycle mutation remains review-required and gated.
contract_decisions_to_freeze: Python is one generated CLI target, but generated/python relocation is deferred to #661.
Dry-run/refusal maturity is separate from mutation-capable maturity.
open_questions_to_close: Which CLI surfaces remain hand-authored after #641?
Can Memory package-local read-only commands be promoted now?
What generated maturity label should lifecycle dry-run/refusal use?
What exact gate blocks mutation-capable lifecycle promotion?
completion_criteria: #657-#660 are implemented or explicitly honest deferrals are checked in.
Any actual dogfooding bugs discovered in this lane are added to state.toml work_items and implemented before archive.
Focused proof and make check pass.
Issues are closed or linked to closing commits/PR.

execution_run.next step: Inspect generated command coverage and checks for #657.

finished_run_review.config compliance: used package workflow and checked-in planning
finished_run_review.misinterpretation risk: medium until queue is fully drained

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Ingest and implement #657-#660 and dogfood findings until queue is empty.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Use checked-in execution state for broad work and keep command authority explicit.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Prefer contract-backed generated surfaces and honest deferral over hidden Python authority.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Can future agents change command interfaces without code archaeology?

closure_check.reopen trigger: Generated CLI queue item remains open or proof fails.

generated_closeout.authority: derived adapter; structured execplan fields remain authoritative

memory_learning_capture.reason: Choose one: none, update_existing_memory_note, create_memory_note, promote_to_docs_contracts_checks_code, route_to_planning, evidence_only.

improvement_signal_review.guidance: At closeout, separate acted-on, reported-only/routed, and dismissed incidental findings; keep this compact and evidence-backed.

drift_log: 2026-05-01: Created checked-in plan for #657-#660 before implementation.
